creator: andreas.hollmann@gmail.com
text:
I tested the patch:

The two patch-files in files must be deleted:

devel/gsoap/files/patch-gsoap_stdsoap2.c
devel/gsoap/files/patch-gsoap_stdsoap2.cpp

They are no longer necessary, as the changes are in upstream gsoap and cannot be applied.

Gsoap compiles successfully, not much else testing done.

It would be nice to have an updated version of gsoap, since it fixes warnings with Clang 3.9.
